_comment: Bounded-window LLM call budget. See tools/llm-budget-guard.py. window_minutes is the rolling window. max_calls / max_tokens are hard ceilings within that window. soft_ratio (0,1] sets the graceful-exit threshold for loops that opt in via --soft. Paid-tier operator approval on 2026-05-01 raised Kimi/Minimax from the old conservative 30/h + 60/h defaults to aggressive audited loop budgets. Keep audit logging and advisory-only provider output; lower these values for unpaid/key-constrained environments. DEEPSEEK-INTEGRATION-CORE (2026-05-26): deepseek-flash + deepseek-pro added with cost-cap envelope ($100/mo total, $80 alert) tracked via cost_usd_per_month_cap; the call/token ceilings are conservative starting points sized to the operator-cited Flash concurrency=2500 / Pro concurrency=500.
